channel.title: CatWithCode - Home
channel.description: Blog for random computer stuff from my daily life. Girl from Germany. Work as a Software Developer. Programming, Linux, Hacking, Modding and tinkering.

item.title: MonoGame with MGCB-Editor on a Rolling-Release Linux Distros
